title: The Hobbit
author: J.R.R. Tolkien
synopsis: A reluctant Hobbit, Bilbo Baggins, sets out on an unexpected journey to reclaim a stolen treasure from a dragon.

title: Project Hail Mary
author: Andy Weir
synopsis: A lone astronaut must save humanity from an extinction-level threat using science, logic, and an unexpected ally.

title: The Silent Patient
author: Alex Michaelides
synopsis: A famous painter shoots her husband five times in the face and then never speaks another word.

title: Atomic Habits
author: James Clear
synopsis: An easy and proven way to build good habits and break bad ones.

title: The Great Gatsby
author: F. Scott Fitzgerald
synopsis: A story of wealth, love, and the American Dream in the Roaring Twenties.

title: The Night Circus
author: Erin Morgenstern
synopsis: Two young magicians are pitted against each other in a magical competition within a mysterious circus.
